title: GORGE CITIZEN ALERT PROGRAM - 211info
text: 211INFO GORGE CITIZEN ALERT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF 211info is working in partnership with Gilliam, Hood River, Sherman, and Wasco Counties to support community members who require assistance signing up for local emergency alert systems. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email 211 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake 211 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and assistance with the sign-up process FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Gilliam, Hood River, Sherman, and Wasco Counties Services: Avalanche Warnings Civil Unrest Advisories Cold Weather Advisories Critical Service Status Information Curfew Information Disease Control Advisories Drought Advisories Earthquake Advisories Evacuation Information Extreme Heat Advisories/Warnings Fire Advisories Flood Advisories Freeze Warnings General Disaster Information Hazardous Materials Emergency Advisories High Tide Advisories High Wind Advisories Hurricane Advisories Landslide/Mudslide Advisories Radiological Emergency Warnings Smog Alerts Terrorism Warnings Thunderstorm Advisories Tornado Advisories Tsunami Advisories Volcanic Eruption Advisories Winter Storm Advisories Other Services Offered At This Location: DISASTER SERVICES - However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
